---
title: "Women Novelists of Queen Victoria’s Reign : A Book of Appreciations by Mrs. Oliphant et aliae CMY contributed essays on Lady Georgiana Fullerton, Julia Stretton and Anne Manning."
---

## Women Novelists of Queen Victoria’s Reign : A Book of Appreciations by Mrs. Oliphant et aliae CMY contributed essays on Lady Georgiana Fullerton, Julia Stretton and Anne Manning.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1897
**Genre:** Non-fiction, biography, criticism
**Format:** Contributions to collection.

**Publisher:** London: Hurst & Blackett, Limited.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
